description: Create a two-column content slide on Life Sciences with a left-side network diagram of selected fields and a right-side bullet list explaining the role of chemistry and biology.

header.kicker: 2. Life Sciences – Addressing major challenges of humanity
header.headline: The powerful network of biology, pharmaceutical and chemistry in Life Sciences provides answers to future challenges of humanity

items.text: Chemistry, biology and pharmaceutical sciences form a powerful interdisciplinary network within Life Sciences
Selected fields of Life Sciences include biophysics, biochemistry, genetics, marine biology, ecology, health sciences, neurosciences, pharmaceutical sciences and medical devices
This network provides answers to future challenges of humanity
